title: orphium arenarium
intro: Orphium arenarium, also known as the Balkan poppy or meadow poppy, is a perennial plant species in the family Papaveraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Orphium arenarium have been attributed to its alkaloid content, which has been found to have a potential therapeutic effect on anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits, which include promoting relaxation, reducing muscle spasms, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
